title: Clangor: Dungeons Soundpack
description: Overhaul your combat audio with Minecraft Dungeons sound effects. Clangor mod required.
body:
![Clangor: Dungeons Soundpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00212b9a705a14010d8153d037df1663867455e4.png) # Features
Experience Minecraft Dungeons Combat Sounds Built entirely using Clangor's export feature, this pack replaces generic game audio with a curated selection of immersive sound effects. It delivers unique audio feedback for your **swings, hits, uses, and hotbar swaps** while serving as a live showcase of the [Clangor](https://modrinth.com/mod/clangor) framework's capabilities.

# Usage
Setup 1. Install [Clangor](https://modrinth.com/mod/clangor) and disable **Built-in Resource Pack** in its config. 1. Place the `.zip` in your `resourcepacks` folder.
Activate 1. Enable the pack under **Options → Resource Packs**. 1. Press `F3` + `T` in-game to apply.
# Attribution
Acknowledgments - Audio assets sourced from Minecraft Dungeons. - Special thanks to the Minecraft Wiki community for archiving these assets.
Rights - Audio assets are property of Mojang Studios & Microsoft. - Non-commercial, fan-made creation for personal use within the Minecraft community.
